statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); ctx=${used:+$(printf '%.0f' "$used")%}; ctx=${ctx:-"ctx: -"}; branch=$(git -C "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ''); printf '\033[35m%s\033[0m | \033[32mctx: %s\033[0m | \033[33m %s\033[0m' "$model" "${used:+$(printf '%.0f' "$used")%}" "$branch"
